mapper.select: select id from logistics_order where order_no = #{orderNo} limit 1
select id from logistics_task where order_id = #{orderId} order by id desc limit 1
select exception_status from logistics_exception where id = #{exceptionId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_exception ( id, order_id, task_id, exception_type, exception_desc, exception_status, report_user, report_time, handle_user, handle_time ) values ( #{id}, #{orderId}, #{taskId}, #{exceptionType}, #{exceptionDesc}, 'WAIT_HANDLE', #{reportUser}, current_timestamp, null, null )
mapper.update: update logistics_order set status = 'EXCEPTION', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{orderId}
update logistics_exception set exception_status = #{exceptionStatus}, handle_user = #{handleUser}, handle_time = current_timestamp where id = #{exceptionId}
